text: Being here, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The clean, modern design of the hallway and meeting room makes me aware of the intentional architecture—everything is arranged with purpose. Then, as I step into the R+D exhibit with its vibrant colors and thoughtful displays, I sense the energy of innovation and collaboration. I am compelled to reflect on how human creativity continually seeks to understand, connect, and invent. The environment feels charged with ideas, inviting me to ponder not just where I am, but what is possible here.
